add-text-annotation-to-page-3.title: Add Text Annotation to Page 3 of PDF
add-text-annotation-to-page-3.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a TextAnnotation on the third page, and save the updated document.

add-popup-annotation-linked-to-highlight.title: Add Popup Annotation Linked to Highlight
add-popup-annotation-linked-to-highlight.description: Loads a PDF, adds a yellow highlight annotation on the first page, creates a popup note annotation, links the popup to the highlight, and saves the modified document.

add-free-text-annotation-arial.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Arial Font to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-arial.description: Shows how to insert a free‑text annotation using Arial 12‑pt font into a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

add-callout-leader-line-to-freetext-anno.title: Add Callout Leader Line to Free‑Text Annotation
add-callout-leader-line-to-freetext-anno.description: Demonstrates how to create a free‑text annotation with a callout leader line in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-freetext-annotation-page-5.title: Hide Free‑Text Annotation on Specific PDF Page
hide-freetext-annotation-page-5.description: Shows how to make a free‑text annotation on page 5 invisible while preserving its data by adding a HideAction to the annotation.

add-yellow-highlight-annotation.title: Add Yellow Highlight Annotation with Opacity
add-yellow-highlight-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a highlight annotation on a PDF page, set its fill color to yellow, and adjust its opacity to 80% before saving the document.

add-underline-annotation-50-opacity.title: Add Underline Annotation with 50% Opacity to PDF Page
add-underline-annotation-50-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to place an underline annotation on a specific PDF page and set its opacity to 50% using Aspose.Pdf.

add-strikeout-annotation-with-author.title: Add StrikeOut Annotation with Author to PDF
add-strikeout-annotation-with-author.description: Demonstrates how to create a strike‑out annotation on a PDF page, set its author (Title) to a specific value, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-specific-annotation-from-pdf-page.title: Delete Specific Annotation from PDF Page
delete-specific-annotation-from-pdf-page.description: Shows how to locate an annotation by its Name and remove it from the second page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-annotations-from-third-pdf-page.title: Remove All Annotations from a Specific PDF Page
remove-annotations-from-third-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access the third page, clear its annotation collection, and save the modified document.

retrieve-annotations-page-four.title: Retrieve Annotations from Page Four and List Their Types
retrieve-annotations-page-four.description: Loads a PDF, accesses the fourth page, extracts its annotation collection, and prints each annotation's type to the console.

update-annotation-rectangle-by-id.title: Update Annotation Rectangle by Id
update-annotation-rectangle-by-id.description: Shows how to locate a PDF annotation by its Name/Id, change its rectangle coordinates, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into a PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF file, import annotations from an XFDF string using a memory stream, and save the updated PDF.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export all its annotations (including those on the current page) to an XFDF file, and save the XFDF beside the original PDF.

import-annotations-from-fdf.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read an FDF file containing annotations, import those annotations into the PDF document, and save the updated file.

batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Text Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through every page of a PDF and programmatically add a TextAnnotation to each page using Aspose.Pdf.

highlight-keyword-across-pdf-pages.title: Highlight Keyword Across PDF Pages
highlight-keyword-across-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to search for a specific word in a PDF document and add a yellow highlight annotation to every occurrence on all pages using Aspose.Pdf.

add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.title: Add Figure Annotations with Custom Line Width and Color
add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.description: Shows how to add square figure annotations with a specific stroke color and line width to selected PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Batch Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Files
batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory and export each document's annotations to an individual XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs in Parallel
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Demonstrates loading PDFs, importing annotation data from an XFDF file, and saving the annotated PDFs using parallel processing for faster batch handling.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations with Appearance Streams to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and export all annotation data, including appearance streams, to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-xfdf-annotation-counts-per-page.title: Validate XFDF Annotation Counts per PDF Page
validate-xfdf-annotation-counts-per-page.description: Loads a PDF, imports annotations from an XFDF file, checks that each page contains the expected number of annotations, and saves the updated document.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file, then re‑import them into a fresh PDF instance and verify that the annotation count remains unchanged.

list-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: List PDF Annotations and Export to CSV
list-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: Opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page's annotations, extracts the annotation name and type, and writes the results to a CSV file.

filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Filter PDF Annotations by Author and Remove Others
filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and removes all annotations that are not authored by the specified user (or lack an author). The filtered document is then saved.

add-strikeout-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add StrikeOut Annotation with Reviewer Author
add-strikeout-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a strike‑out (strikethrough) annotation over a paragraph in a PDF and set its author to a reviewer using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-annotation-summary-per-pdf-page.title: Generate Annotation Summary per PDF Page
generate-annotation-summary-per-pdf-page.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page, counts the different annotation types present, and writes a pretty‑printed JSON summary file.

add-polyline-figure-annotation.title: Add Polyline Figure Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-figure-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a custom polyline figure annotation with visual properties, add it to a page, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-arrow-line-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Arrow Line Annotation to PDF
add-arrow-line-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a line annotation with arrow line endings on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.description: Demonstrates loading an FDF file and importing its annotations onto the matching pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

recolor-highlight-annotations.title: Recolor Highlight Annotations to Light Green
recolor-highlight-annotations.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through all pages and annotations, detect highlight annotations, change their color to light green, and save the modified document.

get-annotation-bounding-rectangle.title: Retrieve Annotation Bounding Rectangle
get-annotation-bounding-rectangle.description: Loads a PDF, locates a specific annotation on a given page, and obtains its bounding rectangle (taking page rotation into account) to log the coordinates.

add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.title: Add Highlight Annotation with 70% Opacity to PDF
add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a highlight annotation, set its opacity to 70%, and save the updated document.

add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Popup Annotation Linked to a Sticky Note
add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextAnnotation (sticky note) and associate a PopupAnnotation that shows additional notes when the parent annotation is selected.

import-xfdf-annotations-reassign-pages.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Reassign to Different PDF Pages
import-xfdf-annotations-reassign-pages.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then move those annotations to other pages based on a custom page‑mapping dictionary.

delete-popup-annotations.title: Delete Popup Annotations from PDF
delete-popup-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to remove all PopupAnnotation objects from each page of a PDF while keeping their parent markup annotations intact, using Aspose.Pdf.

group-pdf-annotations-by-type.title: Group PDF Annotations by Type and Report Counts
group-pdf-annotations-by-type.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, groups annotations by their AnnotationType, and prints a summary of how many instances exist for each type.

add-figure-annotation-external-image.title: Add Figure Annotation Referencing External Image
add-figure-annotation-external-image.description: Demonstrates how to create a file‑attachment (figure) annotation that points to an external image file, set its icon, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import them into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-text-annotation-to-first-page.title: Batch Add Text Annotation to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-text-annotation-to-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, add a standard TextAnnotation to the first page of each document, and save the modified files.

modify-square-annotation-color.title: Modify Square Annotation Color in PDF
modify-square-annotation-color.description: Loads a PDF, finds the first square (figure) annotation on the first page, retrieves its appearance dictionary, changes the annotation color to red, and saves the updated document.

delete-annotations-from-csv.title: Delete PDF Annotations Using IDs from a CSV File
delete-annotations-from-csv.description: Loads a list of annotation identifiers from a CSV file, iterates through all pages of a PDF, and removes any annotation whose Name matches an identifier, then saves the updated document.

set-line-thickness-figure-annotation.title: Set Line Thickness of Figure Annotation
set-line-thickness-figure-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a square figure annotation to a PDF page and set its border width to two points for clearer visualization.

extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Extract Popup Annotation Text to a New PDF
extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, finds the first PopupAnnotation, extracts its text content, and saves that content as a separate PDF document.

add-free-text-annotation-with-callout.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Callout to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-with-callout.description: Demonstrates how to add a free‑text annotation that includes a callout line to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-annotations-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload to Cloud Storage
export-annotations-xfdf.description: Creates a PDF with a text annotation, exports its annotations to an XFDF file, and demonstrates uploading the XFDF to a cloud storage bucket.

remove-highlight-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Highlight Annotations from PDF
remove-highlight-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate all highlight annotations on each page, delete them, and save the cleaned document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Popup Annotations to XFDF
export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to extract only popup annotations from a PDF and save them as an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-fdf__v3.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf__v3.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read an FDF file and import its annotations onto the correct pages, then save the updated document.

add-transparent-freetext-annotation.title: Add Transparent Free‑Text Annotation to PDF
add-transparent-freetext-annotation.description: Shows how to overlay a free‑text annotation with a transparent background onto an existing PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

set-line-ending-styles-for-line-annotati.title: Set Line Ending Styles for a Line Annotation
set-line-ending-styles-for-line-annotati.description: Creates a PDF, adds a line annotation, and configures its start and end line ending styles to a circle and an open arrow.

change-highlight-annotation-color.title: Change Highlight Annotation Color in PDF
change-highlight-annotation-color.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages to find highlight annotations, inspects their appearance dictionary, and replaces the annotation color with a custom shade before saving the document.

batch-add-popup-annotations.title: Batch Add Popup Annotations Linked to Text Annotations
batch-add-popup-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through every page of a PDF and add a TextAnnotation together with an associated PopupAnnotation, linking them and saving the result.

import-xfdf-annotations-visibility-by-ro.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Set Visibility Based on User Role
import-xfdf-annotations-visibility-by-ro.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF and toggle their hidden flag according to the current user's role.

add-polyline-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Polyline Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a polyline annotation from a list of points and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-magenta-underline-annotation.title: Add Magenta Underline Annotation to PDF
add-magenta-underline-annotation.description: Shows how to insert an underline annotation on a PDF page, set its color to magenta, and define a border thickness of two points using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-highlight-annotation-image.title: Extract Highlight Annotation Preview and Embed as Image in Report
extract-highlight-annotation-image.description: Creates a PDF with a highlight annotation, renders the page containing the annotation to an image, and embeds that image into a new PDF report.

set-callout-leader-line-length.title: Set Callout Leader Line Length for Free‑Text Annotation
set-callout-leader-line-length.description: Demonstrates creating a free‑text annotation in a PDF and configuring its callout leader line length (20 points) using Aspose.Pdf.

export-annotations-xfdf-upload.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload via REST
export-annotations-xfdf-upload.description: Shows how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf and then upload the XFDF to a REST API endpoint with HttpClient.

import-multiple-fdf-annotations.title: Import Multiple FDF Annotations and Consolidate
import-multiple-fdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from several FDF files into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, then gather all page annotations into a single collection.

add-popup-annotation-with-custom-size.title: Add Popup Annotation with Custom Size to PDF
add-popup-annotation-with-custom-size.description: Shows how to create a parent markup (TextAnnotation), attach a PopupAnnotation with custom dimensions and position, and save the modified PDF.

set-figure-annotation-border-color.title: Set Figure Annotation Border Color to Dark Gray
set-figure-annotation-border-color.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through all pages and annotations, identify figure annotations, and change their border color to dark gray using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: Export PDF Annotation IDs and Authors to CSV
export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page's annotations, extracts the annotation name and author (title), and writes the data to a CSV file for auditing.

add-highlight-annotation-with-opacity.title: Add Highlight Annotation with Custom Opacity to PDF
add-highlight-annotation-with-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to add a highlight annotation with a custom opacity to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-all-annotations-restore-from-xfdf.title: Delete All PDF Annotations and Restore from XFDF
delete-all-annotations-restore-from-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove every annotation from a PDF document and then re‑import them from an XFDF backup using Aspose.Pdf.

set-highlight-annotation-opacity.title: Set Highlight Annotation Opacity to 60%
set-highlight-annotation-opacity.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and annotations, and change the opacity of all highlight annotations to 60% before saving the document.

add-video-screen-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Video Screen Annotation to PDF Page
add-video-screen-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a ScreenAnnotation that plays a video file, and adding it to the third page of the document.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Clickable Sound Annotation to PDF
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed an MP3 file as a SoundAnnotation in a PDF, configure its visual properties, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-a-3d-annotation-using-a-u3d-model-fi.title: Add A 3D Annotation Using A U3D Model File And Set Its Initial View On Page Two

retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-from-.title: Retrieve First RichMediaAnnotation from Page 5
retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-from-.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access page five, query for the first RichMediaAnnotation using LINQ, and display its key properties.

remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Sound Annotations from PDF
remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through each page, identify all SoundAnnotation objects, delete them, and save the cleaned document.

add-javascript-button-annotation-page-fo.title: Add JavaScript Button Annotation on Page Four
add-javascript-button-annotation-page-fo.description: Demonstrates how to add a push button field to the fourth page of a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that shows an alert when the button is clicked.

create-button-annotation-go-to-page-10.title: Create Button Annotation to Navigate to Page 10
create-button-annotation-go-to-page-10.description: Demonstrates how to add a button field to a PDF page and assign a GoToAction so that clicking the button jumps to page 10 of the same document.

insert-watermark-annotation-page-6.title: Insert Watermark Annotation on Page 6
insert-watermark-annotation-page-6.description: Demonstrates adding a WatermarkAnnotation with 30% opacity centered on the sixth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-watermark-annotation.title: Add Text Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
add-text-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and add a bold "Confidential" text watermark annotation at the top of each page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Image to PDF Page
add-background-image-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a BackgroundArtifact from an image file, mark it as a background, and add it to a specific page's Artifacts collection in a PDF document.

add-bates-numbering-with-prefix.title: Add Bates Numbering with Prefix to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-prefix.description: Demonstrates how to add Bates numbering to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with a custom "ABC" prefix and a six‑digit format.

count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.title: Count Watermark Artifacts on a PDF Page
count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access the first page's Artifacts collection, filter for WatermarkArtifact objects, and count them.

set-watermark-opacity-50.title: Set Watermark Opacity to 50% in PDF
set-watermark-opacity-50.description: Shows how to retrieve all watermark artifacts on each PDF page and programmatically change their opacity to 50% using Aspose.Pdf.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v3.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v3.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import those annotations into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

import-fdf-annotations-merge-pdf.title: Import FDF Annotations and Merge into PDF
import-fdf-annotations-merge-pdf.description: Shows how to read form field annotations from an FDF file and merge them into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-screen-annotations-with-videos.title: Batch Add Screen Annotations with Videos to PDF Pages
batch-add-screen-annotations-with-videos.description: Demonstrates how to attach a different video file to each page of a multi‑page PDF by creating and adding ScreenAnnotation objects in a loop.

remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf.title: Remove Background Artifacts from PDF Pages
remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, locate BackgroundArtifact objects, delete them, and save the updated document.

create-external-url-link-annotation.title: Create External URL Link Annotation in PDF
create-external-url-link-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation to a PDF page that opens an external URL when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-internal-link-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Internal Link Annotation to PDF
add-internal-link-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a link annotation that navigates to a specific page within the same PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Sound Annotation to All PDF Pages
add-sound-annotation-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to loop through every page of a PDF and attach a SoundAnnotation that plays a notification tone when the page loads.

add-auto-play-rich-media-annotation.title: Add Auto‑Play Rich Media Annotation to PDF
add-auto-play-rich-media-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed a video as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF and configure it to start automatically when the page becomes visible.

clone-watermark-annotation-multiple-page.title: Clone Watermark Annotation and Apply to Multiple Pages
clone-watermark-annotation-multiple-page.description: Demonstrates how to locate an existing WatermarkAnnotation, clone its properties, and add adjusted copies to every page of a PDF document.

export-only-annotation-data-from-a-pdf-t.title: Export Only Annotation Data From A Pdf To An Xfdf Stream Without Saving The Full Document

replace-watermark-annotations.title: Batch Replace Watermark Annotations with Corporate Logo
replace-watermark-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF, remove existing WatermarkAnnotation objects and replace them with a WatermarkArtifact that uses a new logo image while preserving the original opacity.

add-3d-annotation-custom-camera-angle.title: Add 3D Annotation with Custom Camera Angle
add-3d-annotation-custom-camera-angle.description: Shows how to embed a U3D/PRC model into a PDF as a 3‑D annotation and create a custom view by defining a camera transformation matrix.

fade-background-artifacts.title: Fade Background Artifacts in PDF
fade-background-artifacts.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating over each page's artifacts, identifying BackgroundArtifact objects, and setting their opacity to 40% to create a faded effect before saving the document.

embed-mp4-video-with-poster.title: Embed MP4 Video with Poster Using RichMediaAnnotation
embed-mp4-video-with-poster.description: Demonstrates how to add a RichMediaAnnotation to a PDF that embeds an MP4 video and displays a poster image before playback.

add-sound-annotation-voiceover-page-five.title: Add Sound Annotation for Voice‑Over on PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-voiceover-page-five.description: Loads a PDF, creates a SoundAnnotation on page 5 with a defined clickable region, and saves the document so that clicking the region plays a voice‑over audio file.

add-qr-code-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add QR Code Watermark to PDF
add-qr-code-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a blank page, and place a QR‑code image as a watermark artifact in the top‑right corner using Aspose.Pdf.

toggle-annotations-visibility-button.title: Toggle Annotations Visibility with a Button
toggle-annotations-visibility-button.description: Shows how to add a button field that runs JavaScript to toggle the hidden state of all annotations on the current PDF page.

batch-add-sound-annotations-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Sound Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-sound-annotations-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF and attach a SoundAnnotation to each page, using a distinct audio file for every page.

extract-screen-annotation-media.title: Extract Media from ScreenAnnotation
extract-screen-annotation-media.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a ScreenAnnotation, then retrieve and save the embedded media file for external analysis.

add-watermark-annotation.title: Add Watermark Annotation with PNG Logo
add-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, generate a PNG logo, and add a semi‑transparent rotated watermark annotation using WatermarkArtifact.

add-read-only-rich-media-pdf-annotation.title: Add Read‑Only Rich Media PDF Annotation
add-read-only-rich-media-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates embedding a PDF into a RichMediaAnnotation, placing it on a page, and disabling all interactive features by setting read‑only and locked‑contents flags.

export-pdf-annotations-to-csv__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to CSV
export-pdf-annotations-to-csv__v2.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through all annotations on each page, and writes their key properties (type, rectangle, contents, title, color) to a CSV file for auditing purposes.

button-annotation-highlight-text-fields.title: Create Button Annotation with JavaScript to Highlight Text Fields
button-annotation-highlight-text-fields.description: Shows how to add a push button to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and attach a JavaScript action that highlights all text fields on the current page.

add-tiled-pdf-page-background-artifact.title: Add Tiled PDF Page as Background Artifact
add-tiled-pdf-page-background-artifact.description: Demonstrates how to use a high‑resolution PDF page as a tiled background by creating a BackgroundArtifact, marking it as background, and attaching it to a page in a new document.

set-link-annotation-border-color-and-wid.title: Set Red Border and Width for Link Annotations
set-link-annotation-border-color-and-wid.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page and its link annotations, changes the border color to red and sets the border width to three points, then saves the updated document.

add-repeating-text-watermark.title: Add Repeating Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-repeating-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkArtifact to place a semi‑transparent, diagonal "CONFIDENTIAL" text watermark behind the content of every page in a PDF document.

add-screen-annotation-external-swf.title: Add Screen Annotation with External SWF (Read‑Only)
add-screen-annotation-external-swf.description: Demonstrates how to add a ScreenAnnotation that references an external SWF file to a PDF page and set it to read‑only to prevent user editing.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files, import matching XFDF annotation files into each PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and save the annotated PDFs to an output folder.

add-rich-media-video-annotation.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation with Click Activation
add-rich-media-video-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed a video into a PDF as a RichMediaAnnotation and configure it to start playback on a click (closest behavior to double‑click). The example loads a PDF, creates the annotation, embeds the video stream, and saves the result.

replace-background-artifacts.title: Replace PDF Page Background Images
replace-background-artifacts.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF pages, locate BackgroundArtifact objects, replace their images while preserving positions, and save the updated document.

add-javascript-link-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to PDF
add-javascript-link-annotation.description: Shows how to create a link annotation that runs a JavaScript function to display a custom modal dialog box in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-watermark-artifact-opacity.title: Batch Add Watermark Artifact with Opacity Based on Page Count
batch-add-watermark-artifact-opacity.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, adds a centered "CONFIDENTIAL" watermark artifact to each page, and sets the watermark opacity according to the document's page count.

add-3d-annotation-metal-lighting.title: Add 3D Annotation with Metal‑like Lighting to PDF
add-3d-annotation-metal-lighting.description: Shows how to embed a 3D model into a PDF and configure lighting and render mode to simulate realistic metal surfaces using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-chime-to-pdf-page.title: Add Sound Annotation (Chime) to a PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-chime-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to add a SoundAnnotation that plays a chime when a specific page is viewed in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

clone-richmedia-annotations-summary-page.title: Clone RichMediaAnnotations to a Summary Page
clone-richmedia-annotations-summary-page.description: Shows how to programmatically copy all RichMediaAnnotation objects from a PDF and place the cloned annotations on a newly added summary page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-button-export-annotations-json.title: Create Button to Export Annotations as JSON
create-button-export-annotations-json.description: Demonstrates how to add a push‑button field to a PDF that runs JavaScript to retrieve all annotations and display them as a JSON string.

add-diagonal-watermark-annotation.title: Add Diagonal Watermark Annotation to PDF
add-diagonal-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a WatermarkAnnotation that spans the page diagonally, setting opacity and a placeholder gradient color, and saving the modified document.

extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.title: Extract Embedded Media from RichMedia Annotations
extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.description: Shows how to walk through PDF pages, locate RichMediaAnnotation objects, and save their embedded audio or video streams into a structured folder hierarchy.

create-link-annotation-external-pdf-page.title: Create Link Annotation to Open External PDF Page
create-link-annotation-external-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation to a PDF that opens a specific page of an external PDF document using a remote go‑to action.

add-animated-gif-screen-annotation.title: Add Animated GIF Screen Annotation to PDF Page
add-animated-gif-screen-annotation.description: Shows how to embed an animated GIF as a looping ScreenAnnotation on the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

align-watermark-annotations-to-margins.title: Align Watermark Annotations to Page Margins
align-watermark-annotations-to-margins.description: Shows how to resize and reposition all WatermarkAnnotation objects so they fit uniformly within defined page margins.

toggle-richmedia-visibility.title: Toggle Rich Media Annotation Visibility with Button
toggle-richmedia-visibility.description: Creates a PDF with a RichMedia annotation and a button that toggles its visibility when clicked.

add-3d-annotation-with-embedded-textures.title: Add 3D Annotation with Embedded Textures and Front View
add-3d-annotation-with-embedded-textures.description: Demonstrates embedding a 3D model (U3D/PRC) with textures into a PDF, creating a 3D annotation, defining a front‑view camera matrix, and setting it as the default view.

batch-replace-watermark-annotations.title: Batch Replace Watermark Annotations with Current Date
batch-replace-watermark-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, and replaces every WatermarkAnnotation with a new text that includes the current date, then saves the document.

create-link-annotation-word-count.title: Create Link Annotation to Show PDF Word Count
create-link-annotation-word-count.description: Demonstrates adding a link annotation to a PDF page that runs JavaScript to calculate the total word count of the document and displays it in an alert.

add-auto-play-background-music.title: Add Auto‑Play Background Music with RichMediaAnnotation
add-auto-play-background-music.description: Shows how to embed an MP3 file as a RichMediaAnnotation that starts playing automatically when the page becomes visible.

add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.title: Add Dynamic Page Number Watermark to PDF
add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.description: Shows how to create a WatermarkAnnotation that displays the current page number on each page, updating automatically using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-pdf-portfolio-rich-media.title: Embed PDF Portfolio as Rich Media Annotation
embed-pdf-portfolio-rich-media.description: Demonstrates creating a RichMediaAnnotation, embedding a PDF portfolio as its content, configuring activation on page open, and saving the resulting PDF.

change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.title: Change Button Annotation Color to Blue
change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.description: Shows how to iterate through all PDF annotations, detect button fields, set their color to blue, and save the modified document.

batch-add-video-screen-annotations.title: Batch Add Video Screen Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-video-screen-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all pages of a PDF, calculate a centered rectangle that preserves a 16:9 video aspect ratio, and add a ScreenAnnotation referencing a video file to each page.

add-rounded-rectangle-annotation-to-tabl.title: Add Rounded Rectangle Annotation Around a Table
add-rounded-rectangle-annotation-to-tabl.description: The example loads a PDF, detects the first table on the first page using TableAbsorber, and adds a square (rounded rectangle) annotation around the table's bounding box.

retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.title: Retrieve Annotation IDs and Page Numbers from PDF
retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, extract each annotation's identifier (Name or FullName) together with its page number, and store the results in a dictionary for fast lookup.

add-rich-media-flash-video-annotation.title: Add Rich Media Flash Video Annotation to PDF
add-rich-media-flash-video-annotation.description: Demonstrates embedding a Flash video into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by creating a RichMediaAnnotation, assigning a custom SWF player, video content, optional poster image, and configuring playback activation.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import annotations from an XFDF file, and save the updated document while preserving the original page layout.

create-3d-annotation-custom-lighting.title: Create 3D Annotation with Custom Lighting
create-3d-annotation-custom-lighting.description: Shows how to embed a 3D model into a PDF and apply a custom lighting scheme and render mode using Aspose.Pdf.

iterate-pdf-annotations-log-media.title: Iterate PDF Annotations and Log Media Files
iterate-pdf-annotations-log-media.description: The example loads a PDF, walks through each page and annotation, and prints the annotation type, rectangle coordinates, and any associated media file name.

replace-background-artifact-image.title: Replace Background Artifact Image with High‑Resolution Version
replace-background-artifact-image.description: Loads a PDF, finds BackgroundArtifact objects on each page, and replaces their image with a higher‑resolution PNG while preserving the page layout.

add-dynamic-date-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Dynamic Date Watermark to Each PDF Page
add-dynamic-date-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent watermark annotation containing a runtime‑generated date string to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

link-annotation-open-embedded-attachment.title: Create Link Annotation to Open an Embedded File
link-annotation-open-embedded-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external file into a PDF and add a link annotation that opens the embedded file when clicked.

set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.title: Set Dashed Border for Button Annotations
set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages to find button field annotations, creates a border if missing, and sets the border style to dashed with a thickness of two points before saving the document.

add-looping-video-screen-annotation.title: Add Looping Video Screen Annotation to PDF
add-looping-video-screen-annotation.description: Demonstrates embedding a video file in a PDF using a ScreenAnnotation, configuring it to play continuously in a loop and disabling playback controls via JavaScript.

extract-watermark-artifacts-report.title: Extract Watermark Artifacts and Generate PDF Report
extract-watermark-artifacts-report.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page's artifacts, extracts WatermarkArtifact objects, and writes their opacity and position to a text report.

create-submit-button-with-javascript.title: Create Submit Button with JavaScript Action in PDF
create-submit-button-with-javascript.description: Shows how to add a push button to a PDF that executes JavaScript to submit the form data to a specified HTTP endpoint.

add-rich-media-video-annotation-hidden-t.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation with Hidden Toolbar
add-rich-media-video-annotation-hidden-t.description: Demonstrates how to embed a video as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF and hide the default playback toolbar for a clean viewer experience.

batch-add-watermark-artifact-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Watermark Artifact to PDFs
batch-add-watermark-artifact-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to load a watermark image once and reuse it to add a WatermarkArtifact to every page of multiple PDF documents, then save the watermarked files to an output folder.

remove-screen-annotations.title: Remove Screen Annotations from PDF
remove-screen-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to delete all ScreenAnnotation objects from a PDF document.

link-annotation-named-destination.title: Create Link Annotation to Named Destination
link-annotation-named-destination.description: Demonstrates how to define a named destination in a PDF and add a link annotation that jumps to it.

add-sound-annotation-visible.title: Add Sound Annotation that Plays When Visible
add-sound-annotation-visible.description: Creates a PDF, adds a SoundAnnotation that plays a tone when the annotation is visible on the page, and saves the result.

duplicate-watermark-annotations.title: Duplicate Watermark Annotations to All Pages
duplicate-watermark-annotations.description: Creates a sample PDF with a watermark annotation on the first page and copies that annotation to every subsequent page.

create-3d-annotation.title: Create 3D Annotation with Realistic Rendering
create-3d-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a 3D annotation with embedded content and set a shaded render mode for realistic appearance.

toggle-watermark-button.title: Toggle Watermark Artifact Visibility with Button Annotation
toggle-watermark-button.description: Demonstrates adding a WatermarkArtifact to a PDF page and a button annotation that runs JavaScript to toggle the watermark's visibility.

export-modify-import-annotations.title: Export, Modify, and Re‑Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-modify-import-annotations.description: Demonstrates exporting PDF annotations to XFDF, changing their color in the XFDF XML, and importing them back into a PDF.

add-watermark-annotation-footer.title: Add Watermark Annotation Footer to Each PDF Page
add-watermark-annotation-footer.description: Creates a sample PDF, then loads it and adds a unique identifier watermark annotation to the footer of each page.

richmedia-annotation-embed-portfolio.title: Create RichMedia Annotation with Embedded PDF Portfolio and Disable Printing
richmedia-annotation-embed-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to embed a PDF portfolio into a RichMediaAnnotation and protect the document by disabling printing.

add-screen-annotation-auto-play.title: Add Screen Annotation with Auto-Play Video
add-screen-annotation-auto-play.description: Demonstrates adding a ScreenAnnotation that references an external video URL and starts playback automatically using JavaScript.

increase-sound-annotation-area.title: Increase Sound Annotation Clickable Area by 20%
increase-sound-annotation-area.description: Creates a PDF with a sound annotation and expands its rectangle by 20% to enlarge the clickable region.

tiled-watermark-artifact.title: Add Tiled Watermark Artifact as Background
tiled-watermark-artifact.description: Demonstrates how to create a WatermarkArtifact using an image pattern and apply it as a tiled background on all pages of a PDF.

add-javascript-link-annotation__v2.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to PDF
add-javascript-link-annotation__v2.description: Creates a PDF, then adds a link annotation that runs JavaScript to open a URL in a new browser window.
